issues.sample: The front windshield cracked in the middle from the top without any impact. It made a butterfly shaped crack going both sides symmetrically from the middle. I took it to BMW Casey in Newport News, Virginia. They looked at it and agreed that there was no impact. They kept the car

narrative.headline: What 2022 Bmw M5 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Unknown Or Other (100% of reports).

issues.title: Unknown Or Other
